code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> STARTUP

    STARTUP --> POSITION_RECOVERY: Initialize Agent

    state POSITION_RECOVERY {FinTech_AuthVault] --> QueryPlatform
        QueryPlatform --> ExtractPositions: get_portfolio_breakdown
        ExtractPositions --> GenerateSyntheticDecisions: Found N positions
        GenerateSyntheticDecisions --> RebuildMemory: Create decision records
        RebuildMemory --> AssociateMonitor: Populate PortfolioMemoryEngine
        AssociateMonitor --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Mark startup_complete

        QueryPlatform --> RetryBackoff: Failure
        RetryBackoff --> QueryPlatform: Exponential delay
        QueryPlatform --> ForceComplete: Max retries
        ForceComplete --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: Continue with empty state
    }

    POSITION_RECOVERY --> IDLE: Recovery Complete

    state IDLE {FinTech_AuthVault] --> WaitInterval
        WaitInterval --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: After analysis_frequency_seconds
    }

    IDLE --> LEARNING: Timer Expires

    state LEARNING {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> FetchClosedTrades
        FetchClosedTrades --> ProcessOutcomes: get_closed_trades
        ProcessOutcomes --> RecordMemory: PortfolioMemoryEngine
        RecordMemory --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Update experience
    }

    LEARNING --> PERCEPTION

    state PERCEPTION {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> FetchPortfolio
        FetchPortfolio --> KillSwitchCheck: get_portfolio_breakdown
        KillSwitchCheck --> DailyReset: P&L within limits
        DailyReset --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: Reset trade count

        KillSwitchCheck --> HALT: P&L breached
    }

    PERCEPTION --> REASONING

    state REASONING {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> LoopAssets
        LoopAssets --> AnalyzeAsset: For each asset
        AnalyzeAsset --> RetryLogic: generate_decision
        RetryLogic --> CheckAction: Success
        CheckAction --> NextAsset: HOLD
        CheckAction --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: BUY/SELL

        RetryLogic --> ExponentialBackoff: Failure
        ExponentialBackoff --> AnalyzeAsset: Retry
        ExponentialBackoff --> MarkFailure: Max retries
        MarkFailure --> NextAsset: Skip

        NextAsset --> LoopAssets: More assets
        NextAsset --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: All processed
    }

    REASONING --> RISK_CHECK: Actionable
    REASONING --> IDLE: No Action

    state RISK_CHECK {FinTech_LedgerService] --> GetMonitoringContext
        GetMonitoringContext --> ValidateTrade: RiskGatekeeper
        ValidateTrade --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Approved
        ValidateTrade --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]: Denied
    }

    RISK_CHECK --> EXECUTION: Approved
    RISK_CHECK --> PERCEPTION: Rejected

    state EXECUTION {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> SendOrder
        SendOrder --> AssociateDecision: execute_trade
        AssociateDecision --> IncrementCounter: TradeMonitor
        IncrementCounter --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: daily_trade_count++

        SendOrder --> LogFailure: Error
        LogFailure --> EXECUTION_FAILED
    }

    EXECUTION --> LEARNING: Executed
    EXECUTION_FAILED --> PERCEPTION: Retry

    state HALT {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> StopAgent
        StopAgent --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: is_running = False
    }

    HALT --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]: Agent Stopped

    style STARTUP fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style POSITION_RECOVERY fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style IDLE fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#424242,color:#fff
    style LEARNING fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style PERCEPTION fill:#2196F3,stroke:#0D47A1,color:#fff
    style REASONING fill:#FF9800,stroke:#E65100,color:#fff
    style RISK_CHECK fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
    style EXECUTION fill:#9C27B0,stroke:#4A148C,color:#fff
    style HALT fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style EXECUTION_FAILED fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个量化交易Agent的完整状态机。核心是从STARTUP开始，经过POSITION_RECOVERY恢复持仓，然后进入IDLE等待，再到LEARNING学习、PERCEPTION感知、REASONING推理，最后RISK_CHECK风控和EXECUTION执行。
明白，这是一个循环工作流。POSITION_RECOVERY内部需要处理平台查询失败的情况吗？比如网络异常或者API限流。
对，POSITION_RECOVERY里要有容错机制。QueryPlatform失败时走RetryBackoff做指数退避，超过最大重试次数就ForceComplete，带着空状态继续，不能阻塞启动。
好的，POSITION_RECOVERY内部结构我画好了：从QueryPlatform到ExtractPositions获取持仓，再到GenerateSyntheticDecisions生成决策记录，RebuildMemory重建记忆，最后AssociateMonitor标记启动完成。失败分支也加上了。
IDLE状态要体现等待逻辑，用WaitInterval节点，触发条件是analysis_frequency_seconds，然后连到FinTech_TransactionQueue。
IDLE画好了。LEARNING阶段我理解为从FetchClosedTrades获取已平仓交易，ProcessOutcomes处理结果，RecordMemory更新到PortfolioMemoryEngine？
没错，LEARNING的核心是经验回放。PERCEPTION阶段要加KillSwitchCheck，这是风控第一道防线，检查P&L是否突破阈值。
KillSwitchCheck通过后走DailyReset重置交易计数，如果P&L breached就直接HALT？
是的，DailyReset连回FinTech_PaymentGateway，HALT是终止状态。REASONING是最复杂的，要遍历所有资产做决策。
REASONING我设计了LoopAssets循环，每个资产走AnalyzeAsset生成决策，然后RetryLogic处理模型调用。成功的话CheckAction判断是HOLD还是BUY/SELL，失败就走ExponentialBackoff重试。
CheckAction到BUY/SELL的连线终点确认一下，应该是FinTech_AuthVault吗？这是权限验证点。
确认，BUY/SELL动作需要FinTech_AuthVault授权。ExponentialBackoff超过最大重试次数走MarkFailure跳过该资产。REASONING结束后，有Actionable的去RISK_CHECK，No Action的回IDLE。
RISK_CHECK用FinTech_LedgerService获取监控上下文，ValidateTrade走RiskGatekeeper，Approved去EXECUTION，Rejected回PERCEPTION重新评估。
RISK_CHECK画好了。EXECUTION内部：SendOrder执行交易，成功走AssociateDecision到IncrementCounter更新daily_trade_count，失败走LogFailure到EXECUTION_FAILED。
EXECUTION_FAILED的处理需要确认，应该是回到PERCEPTION重试，而不是直接HALT。
已调整，EXECUTION_FAILED连到PERCEPTION。EXECUTION成功走LEARNING进行经验学习。HALT状态我画了StopAgent设置is_running=False。
最后加上颜色区分状态：STARTUP和POSITION_RECOVERY用青色#00BCD4，IDLE灰色，LEARNING绿色，PERCEPTION蓝色，REASONING橙色，RISK_CHECK黄色，EXECUTION紫色，HALT和EXECUTION_FAILED红色。
颜色样式已应用。我检查一下整体结构：STARTUP→POSITION_RECOVERY→IDLE→LEARNING→PERCEPTION→REASONING→(RISK_CHECK→EXECUTION或IDLE)→循环，还有HALT终止分支，看起来完整了。
等等，PERCEPTION里的FetchPortfolio来源应该是FinTech_TransactionQueue，不是FinTech_AuthVault，我刚才看错了。
已修正，FetchPortfolio现在正确指向FinTech_TransactionQueue。还有其他需要调整的吗？
没问题了。整个状态机涵盖了Agent的完整生命周期：启动恢复、空闲等待、学习进化、感知市场、推理决策、风控检查、执行交易，以及异常终止。可以定稿。
